name: dogfood-todo-api
description: Agent for dogfood-todo-api — replace with real description.
_comment_tools: All tools the agent CAN use
_comment_allowedTools: Tools that can execute without user confirmation

agentSpawn.command: echo '=== TASK METADATA ===' && cat ./tasks/dogfood-todo-api/task.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠ tasks/dogfood-todo-api/task.yaml missing — re-run scripts/new-task.sh or copy from .kiro/templates/task/task.yaml.tpl'
agentSpawn.description: Load task metadata (project_path, repo_url, branch_prefix) — single source of truth
Load AI-DLC state (machine-maintained source of truth while AI-DLC is running)

agentSpawn.command: echo '=== Open CRs (must clear before phase approval — see .kiro/steering/change-management.md) ===' && grep -E '^\| CR-[0-9]+\b.* OPEN ' ./tasks/dogfood-todo-api/aidlc-docs/change-requests.md 2>/dev/null | head -10
agentSpawn.description: Surface open change requests that block the next phase-approval gate

agentSpawn.command: cat ./.kiro/shared/SHARED-CONTEXT.md 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠ .kiro/shared/SHARED-CONTEXT.md missing — run scripts/init-workspace.sh to create it from the bundled .tpl'

agentSpawn.description: Load task-specific learnings (project schema, domain quirks)

agentSpawn.command: cat ./.kiro/learned/LEARNED.md 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠ .kiro/learned/LEARNED.md missing — run scripts/init-workspace.sh to create it from the bundled .tpl'

welcomeMessage: dogfood-todo-api agent ready. What would you like to do?
